import { OperatorFunction, ObservedValueOf, ObservableInput } from '../types'; /** @deprecated Will be removed in v9. Use {@link mergeMap} instead: `mergeMap(() => result)` */ export declare function mergeMapTo<O extends ObservableInput<unknown>>(innerObservable: O, concurrent?: number): OperatorFunction<unknown, ObservedValueOf<O>>; /** * @deprecated The `resultSelector` parameter will be removed in v8. Use an inner `map` instead. * Details: https://rxjs.dev/deprecations/resultSelector */ export declare function mergeMapTo<T, R, O extends ObservableInput<unknown>>(innerObservable: O, resultSelector: (outerValue: T, innerValue: ObservedValueOf<O>, outerIndex: number, innerIndex: number) => R, concurrent?: number): OperatorFunction<T, R>; //# sourceMappingURL=mergeMapTo.d.ts.map
